---
title: "Yair Litman"
comments: false
about:
  id: contact
  template: solana
  image-shape: round
  image: profile.jpg
---

:::{#contact}

#### {{< fa envelope >}} &nbsp; yl899@cam.ac.uk

#### {{< fa map-location-dot >}} &nbsp; Max Planck Institute for Polymer Research <br> &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Ackermannweg 10, 55128 Mainz, Germany

:::

<br>

```{=html}
<iframe
  src="https://www.openstreetmap.org/export/embed.html?bbox=8.22%2C49.97%2C8.25%2C49.99&layer=mapnik&marker=49.9804%2C8.2356"
  width="100%" height="400"
  style="border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 6px;"
  allowfullscreen>
</iframe>
<p style="font-size:0.8rem; color:#666; margin-top:0.4rem;">
  <a href="https://www.openstreetmap.org/?mlat=49.9804&mlon=8.2356" target="_blank">View larger map</a>
</p>
```
